name: multi-publish
description: 多平台内容一键发布 — Monorepo

scripts.check:deps: npx depcheck --ignore-dirs=dist,node_modules,.playwright-browsers --ignores=@vitejs/*,vite,app-builder-bin,electron,jest 2>&1 || echo "WARN: depcheck issues found (non-blocking)"
scripts.check:circular: npx madge --warning --circular apps/desktop/electron/main.js 2>&1 || echo "WARN: circular deps found (non-blocking)"
